source.note: SHA-256 guest APC (standalone runtime stress case): the single largest autoprecompile by variable count from powdr's OpenVM SHA-256 guest benchmark. Generated as an ApcWithBusMap gzipped JSON (the {machine, bus_map, next_free_id} shape the parser reads) from powdr's pre-optimization APC export.
source.purpose: Runtime-only stress benchmark. ~170k variables / ~200k constraints / ~84k bus interactions; one apc-optimizer run takes ~20 minutes, so CI benches it on its own runner (see the bench-runtime-sha job in .github/workflows/lean_action_ci.yml).
